title: Tangy Italian Jam Tart
description: A tangy and light flaky dessert featuring a homemade jam with ricotta cheese, eggs are optional due to the tart's egg-free-friendly nature.
instructions: Blend flour and butter until crumbly; add sugar and mix with fingertips to form dough. Chill for at least an hour.

On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough into a circle about 1/8-inch thick. Place in a 9-inch tart pan, trim edges, blind bake according to crust recipe (e.g., preheat oven, arrange parchment paper and beans on bottom, brush with egg wash).
In a mixing bowl, combine lime juice, lemon zest, chopped basil, and optional cream cheese. Mix until smooth.
Allow the crust to cool slightly before filling with the jam mixture. Bake at 375°F for about 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm.
For an egg-free version, reduce the ricotta to half of its original quantity.
